# Update Email Address

To update your email address on an Acme Shop account, log in and go to "Account Settings" via your profile icon. In the "Personal Information" section, edit the "Email Address" by entering your new address and account password. A confirmation email with a verification link will be sent to the new address, which must be clicked within 24 hours to finalize the update, or the change will be canceled. Users can seek help from customer support for issues like verification emails not being received or access to the old email address being lost.

[Source: account_management.md#update-email-address]
